name: Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles
author: Poki
description: It's time to set sail on the high seas in Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles. In this pirate adventure game, you set out to make a name for yourself as the best and most notorious pirate there ever was! As you sail around the world, you can fight trade vessels and other pirate ships - looting them for cargo that you can sell. With the profits from your privateering, you can buy upgrades to make your ship quicker and stronger! Explore the vast oceans and find legendary ships to battle, sea monsters to hunt and villagers to save. Do you have what it takes to become a legendary pirate? How to play Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles? Use WASD, the Arrow keys or the mouse to move your ship! Who created Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles? Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles was created by Cool Bears Game Studio. Play their other game on Poki: Boxing Physics 2 ! How can I play Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles for free? You can play Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles for free on Poki. Can I play Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles on mobile devices and desktop? Pirate Heroes - Sea Battles can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
